mapper.select: select bno from member where id = #{id}
select count(*) from store where store_id = #{storeId}
select count(*) from store where store_code = #{storeCode}
mapper.insert: insert into store(store_id, store_code, store_name, store_address, store_phone, ceo_bno, created_at) values(#{store_id}, #{store_code}, #{store_name}, #{store_address}, #{store_phone}, #{ceo_bno}, now())
insert into store_member(store_id, member_bno, position, chk, employment, health, rate, color) values(#{store_id}, #{member_bno}, #{position}, #{chk}, #{employment}, #{health}, #{rate}, #{color})
mapper.select: select * from store where ceo_bno = #{ceoBno} order by created_at desc
select * from store where store_id = #{storeId} and ceo_bno = #{ceoBno} limit 1
select * from store_member where store_id = #{storeId} and member_bno = #{memberBno} limit 1

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.name, m.email, m.phone, sm.position, sm.chk, sm.created_at from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 0 order by sm.store_member_id desc

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.name, m.email, m.phone, sm.employment, sm.health, sm.rate, sm.created_at from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 1 order by sm.store_member_id desc

select sm.store_member_id, sm.store_id, sm.member_bno, m.name, m.email, m.phone, sm.employment, sm.health, sm.rate, sm.created_at from store_member sm join member m on sm.member_bno = m.bno where sm.store_id = #{storeId} and sm.store_member_id = #{storeMemberId} and sm.position = '직원' and sm.chk = 1 limit 1
